---
name: Idea or feature proposal
about: A loop you are stuck in, or something Klip should do
labels: enhancement
---

Describe the loop you are stuck in. A rough paragraph beats a polished spec — most of what Klip does
started as somebody's annoyance.

If you already picture the shape (a shortcut, a row action, a new "copy for X"), say so. If you only
have the annoyance, that is still a good issue.
